jaylen brown.detail: Played 43 minutes, scored 35 points, played entire fourth quarter in normal game completion.

jayson tatum.detail: Played 39 minutes, scored 23 points, played entire fourth quarter in normal game completion.

julius randle.detail: Played 28 minutes in a blowout win (124-104); limited minutes likely due to game flow in a comfortable victory rather than any flagged injury.

kawhi leonard.detail: Played 30 minutes, scored 34 points in a normal game; minutes consistent with managed load in a win.

kevin durant.detail: Played 36 minutes, scored 24 points in a normal game completion.

rj barrett.detail: Played 31 minutes, scored 16 points in a blowout win (121-95); minutes reduction likely due to game flow.

scottie barnes.detail: Played 30 minutes, scored 25 points in a blowout win (121-95); minutes reduction likely due to game flow.

shai gilgeous-alexander.detail: Played only 28 minutes in a 123-87 blowout victory; minutes were clearly limited as the Thunder built a massive lead against an injury-depleted Lakers squad.
shai gilgeous-alexander.web_narrative: SGA played just 28 minutes as OKC rolled to a 36-point blowout win over a heavily shorthanded Lakers team missing Doncic, LeBron, Reaves, Smart, and Hayes. The lopsided margin naturally curtailed his playing time.
